AION Renewal.desc: After a final blow with a Rocket Launcher, Grenade Launcher, or micro-missile, sprint for a short time to gain Speed Booster.
Once per activation of Force Converter, sprinting while at critical health, being suspended, or being slowed by a Stasis effect will immediately grant Speed Boo

AION Adapter.desc: Final blows with a Rocket Launcher, Grenade Launcher, or micro-missile temporarily decrease incoming area-of-effect damage.
When Force Absorption is active, taking melee damage causes you to emit a disorienting burst once.

Techsec.desc: You deal significantly increased Kinetic damage to combatant shields, overshields, vehicles, and constructs. Constructs include barricades, turrets, Stasis crys
Defeating powerful combatants or breaking a combatant shield with Kinetic damage releases a disorienting Kinetic shockwave.

Last Discipline.desc: Final blows with primary ammo weapons grant your primary ammo weapons temporarily increased reload speed.
Picking up an Orb of Power grants Special ammo progress.

Collective Psyche.desc: Picking up an ammo brick gives you a stacking bonus to weapon swap and stow speeds until you die.
Suspend, unravel, and sever effects applied to targets, and radiant and restoration effects applied to you have increased duration.

Bushido.desc: Final blows with freshly drawn or reloaded weapons heal you.
Bow, Shotgun, or Sword final blows temporarily reduce incoming damage. Damaging targets with those weapons extends the effect.

Twofold Crown.desc: Picking up an ammo brick heals you.
Final blows with Primary ammo weapons grant you briefly increased radar resolution.

Lustrous.desc: Receiving healing temporarily grants your Solar weapons increased flinch resistance, handling, and reload speed.
Rapid Solar final blows heal you.

Smoke Jumper Set.desc: When you pick up an Orb of Power, gain a brief period of rapidly decaying damage reduction.
Defeating a powerful combatant with a finisher grants you Special ammo progress and replenishes a small amount of health.

Disaster Corps Set.desc: Reloading an Auto Rifle, Scout Rifle, or Sidearm after a final blow slowly restores health until you reenter combat.
When you reach critical health or heal an ally at critical health, Auto Rifles, Scout Rifles, and Sidearms gain a period of increased range, stability, and relo

Wayward Psyche Set.desc: Picking up ammo reloads stowed Special weapons from reserves.
After dealing damage with your Super, health and shields regenerate over time while you are in motion. Additional Super damage refreshes this effect.

Iron Panoply Set.desc: As your health gets lower, your weapons gain increased stability and handling. Weapon final blows while your shields are depleted heal you.
When your shields become broken, you gain increased ammo generation, flinch resistance, and damage resistance against nearby combatants for a short time. Final

Ferropotent.desc: When your shields begin to regenerate, you gain flinch resistance and damage resistance for a short time.
While your reserves are low, combatant final blows with weapons provide additional ammo progress based on their ammo type.  Primary ammo weapons boost Special a

Wild Anthem.desc: Gain increased reload speed for the bottom half of your equipped weapon's magazine.
Reloading a weapon grants it a bonus to handling and reduces incoming flinch for a short time. Weapons with the SUROS Synergy Origin Trait are granted increased

Sage Protector.desc: Sword hits return grenade and class energy. Bonus energy is granted if Blade Focus is active.
Briefly guard with a Sword to ready Blade Focus. While Blade Focus is readied, hitting a target with your sword increases Sword damage and lunge distance for a

Swordmaster.desc:
Damaging a target with a Sword, Glaive, or any melee attack exhausts them. 

Exhausted targets deal reduced outgoing damage.
Blocking attacks with a Sword or Glaive grants a short period of damage resistance against targets when you next drop your guard.

New Demotic.desc: Primary ammo weapons gain a bonus to flinch resistance after sliding.
Your weapons gain a temporary increase to handling and aim-down-sights speed when an ally is defeated or you revive an ally.

Shrewd Survivor.desc: Swapping to a Heat weapon, Submachine Gun, or Hand Cannon grants a short period of increased handling and accuracy. This effect is extended by dealing damage wi
Dealing final blows while Reflex Action is active grants a bonus to weapon stat and increases stability, reload, and aim assist for Heat weapons, Submachine Gun

Thriving Survivor.desc: Final blows with grenades grant Heat weapons bonus stability and vent speed and grant Primary ammo weapons bonus stability and reload speed.
Multiple final blows with Heat weapons or Primary ammo weapons grant bonuses to weapon and grenade stats and increased ammo generation for Heat weapons and Prim

Luminopotent.desc: While amplified, your Fusion Rifles, Linear Fusion Rifles, and Heat weapons gain increased handling, reload, and vent speeds.
Final blows with Jolt or against jolted combatants create Ionic Traces.

Triumphal Anthem.desc: Sliding collects nearby ammo and temporarily grants enhanced reload speed and handling to your weapons.
Dealing damage with your weapons temporarily grants enhanced sliding. Sliding provides damage resistance.

Flain.desc: Taking damage from combatants sometimes spawns a Threadling.
For a short time after your shields break, your next several Threadling hits restore health.

Spacewalk.desc: Primary ammo weapons deal increased damage to disoriented combatants.
Your grenade abilities release an additional disorienting pulse shortly after detonating.

Dark Age.desc: Hitting combatants with melee attacks or Sword strikes grants a stack of Initiative, giving bonus handling and reload. Stacks decay slowly over time.
While you have Initiative, using your class ability creates a stationary healing aura. The aura gains increased healing based on the number of Initiative stacks

Taken King.desc: Finishing combatants or reviving allies initiates a Lucent Hive ritual. While the ritual is active, gain increased Super stat.
Collecting Orbs of Power extends the Ceremony. While it is active, ability final blows occasionally spawn allied Arc moths.

TM Custom.desc: Stowing a weapon after defeating a powerful combatant or a Guardian heals you a small amount and disorients nearby combatants.
Freshly drawn weapons deal increased precision damage to combatants for a short period. Weapons with the Tex Balanced Stock Origin Trait equipped or Exotics man

Deep Explorer.desc: Taking damage increases the reload speed of your equipped weapon until it is stowed. Taking more damage increases the effect.
When you stow a weapon, restore health based on the number of Built Bitter stacks lost.

Yearning Echo.desc: Picking up ammo, Orbs of Power, Elemental pickups, or destroying a Strand Tangle grants stacks of Untold Greed, slightly reducing damage taken and providing rel
While you have stacks of Untold Greed, Orbs of Power and Elemental pickups provide more of their respective energy, and Strand Tangles deal increased damage. Wh

CODA.desc: Final blows with Light weapons grants stacks of Light Polarity, which grants Grenade stat. Final blows with Darkness or Kinetic weapons grants stacks of Dark Po
Final blows with Light weapons grants additional grenade energy. Final blows with Dark or Kinetic weapons grants additional melee energy. Rapid final blows that

Apostate's Blade.desc: Performing a finisher stores power. The next time your shields are broken, consume stored power to immediately heal and start health regeneration.
While you have Radiant, Restoration, or Cure, your melee hits release a burst that will scorch the target.

Techeun's Regalia.desc: Gain a powerful overshield while performing your finisher. When you finish a target, release a slowing burst around you.
Gain increasing damage resistance when you deal damage or land final blows. Finishers grant accelerated progress. At max stacks, the recharge rate of your abili

Circuit.desc: Fast movement builds up a charge that gradually increases your health regeneration speed. Once you are Fully Revved, sprinting grants Speed Booster.
Sliding while Speed Booster is active jolts combatants in front of you.

Great Hunt.desc: Grenade final blows temporarily reduce incoming damage.
Grenade final blows grant additional Heavy ammo progress.

Kentarch 3.desc:
Being near allies creates a relay network that gives the wearer improved handling and reload speed. 

Being near other allied Network Admins additionally grants
Weapon final blows grant the wearer and nearby allies melee energy.

Legacy's Oath.desc: Powered melees release an additional disorienting pulse when used to defeat a target.
When your shields are broken by a combatant, or upon casting your Super, release a swarm of heat seeking micro-missiles.

Atheon's Memory.desc: After picking up an Orb of Power, the next time your shields are broken, gain a bonus to Health stat for a short duration and release a burst of radiolaria arou
While you have a subclass buff, dealing sustained damage creates an Orb of Power.

Oryx's Memory.desc: Final blows on Guardians and powerful combatants generate additional ammo progress.
After a final blow on a powerful combatant, the next time your shields are broken, you become invisible.

Nezarec's Nightmare.desc: Final blows versus subclass-debuffed targets have an escalating chance to spawn an Orb of Power.
Performing a finisher versus a powerful combatant grants Devour. While you have Devour, gain damage resistance versus combatants.

Crota's Memory.desc: Melee final blows trigger a Cursed Thrall explosion.
Being in combat for a duration grants progressively more flinch resistance and damage resistance versus combatants.

Promised.desc: Defeating a powerful combatant generates Stable Resonance, which grants damage resistance and increased weapon damage for the duration.
While you have Stable Resonance, continued weapon damage occasionally generates a resonance burst that damages and exhausts targets.

Resonant Fury.desc: Your health begins regenerating immediately after taking melee damage from a powerful combatant.
Gain stacks of Siphoning Touch for weapon or Glaive melee hits. Switching weapons heals you and consumes all stacks.

Eutechnology.desc: Rapidly defeating combatants with Void energy spawns a Void breach.
After collecting a Void breach, your next final blow with a Void weapon triggers a detonation. The detonation is more powerful if it is triggered quickly after

Cruel Electrum.desc: When an ally is defeated, Primary ammo weapons gain increased handling, reload speed, target acquisition, and reduced flinch. Bonus increases when multiple alli
Final blows with Primary ammo weapons remove you from radar for a short time. Drawing a weapon that does not use Primary ammo will immediately end this effect.

Iron Battalion Set.desc: Increases handling and reload speed for Primary ammo weapons. Primary ammo weapons gain increased damage against non-boss combatants based on your Weapons stat.
Final blows while your Super is active refund Super energy when it ends.

Per Audacia.desc: Primary ammo weapon final blows grant a stacking bonus to mobility and Primary weapon range and handling until you are defeated.
Increases mobility and grants enhanced sprint speed and slide distance.

Cyberserpent Null.desc: Sprinting for a short time grants a period of improved reload speed and handling. Final blows extend this period.
While Adrenal Rush is active, final blows grant Special Ammo progress. Final Blows against powerful combatants, Guardians, and Taken grants additional progress.

Seventh Seraph.desc: Final blows with area-of-effect damage, Solar abilities, Seventh Seraph weapons, or IKELOS weapons grant Warmind Charges. Each stack of Warmind Charge increases
While you have Warmind Charges, defeating powerful combatants, destroying a construct, or destroying a Tangle releases a Solar detonation that damages combatant

Pantheos Resplendent.desc: Picking up ammo grants Armor Charge. Grants a bonus to Health stat per Armor Charge you have.
Sustained damage on minibosses, Champions, and bosses increases weapon damage versus base and powerful combatants. Weapon final blows consume one stack each.

Wildwood.desc: Precision final blows while aiming down sights grant damage resistance until you stop aiming down sights.
Precision final blows with any weapon grant a stacking bonus to reload speed, target acquisition, and weapon damage against non-boss combatants for a short dura

Exodus Down.desc: When your shields become broken, collect all nearby Orbs of Power and ammo bricks.

Whenever you gain, lose, or spend an Armor Charge, heal and gain damage reduction for a short time.

This effect scales with the amount of Armor Charge gained,

Reverie Dawn.desc: Taking significant damage in a short time generates a Protective Wish that makes it harder for combatants to hit you, and grants increased reload speed and flin

When the Protective Wish expires, it cures you. 

Rapid final blows prematurely end the Protective Wish.

Dreambane.desc: Final blows to a challenging combatant or higher-ranked target grant Unstable Essence. When you have Unstable Essence, you receive grenade and melee stat bonuse
When you have Unstable Essence, rapid weapon damage or final blows heal you and begin health regeneration.

Crystocrene.desc: After being out of combat for a moderate duration, your next final blow grants additional ammo progress and creates an Orb of Power.
After being out of combat for a moderate duration, slowly gain Frost Armor until you reenter combat.

Veritas.desc: Performing a finisher on a combatant, or landing successive powered melee final blows, generates an Elemental pickup based on your Light subclass.
Performing a finisher on powerful combatants heals you and generates loyal Void moths.

Thunderhead.desc: Activating your grenade or the Nanotech Tracer Missiles Origin Trait provides stacking resistance to incoming damage at point-blank range.
Defeating an unraveled combatant grants grenade ability energy. If you have max grenade energy, you are granted Special ammo meter progress instead.

First Ascent.desc: Defeating targets with unique elemental damage grants a stacking bonus to Transcendence energy gains while Transcendence is inactive.
While Transcendence is active, using your grenade ability consumes all stacks of Stack 'Em Up to grant an escalating amount of grenade energy.
